transcript.text:
(Today's menu is Jjamjjamyeon*!) Usually, they are divided like this *Half black bean sauce noodle, half spicy seafood noodle
The jjamppong* and jajangmyeon** is served separately *Spicy Seafood Noodle **Black Bean Sauce Noodle
(But...?)
This place’s jjamjjamyeon is served so that I can mix it together
I'm so curious
How do you eat all of that?!
(Absolutely unbelievable)
How do you eat all that food?
(Mix it! Mix it!)
(This is how I do it!)
(The real jjamjjamyeon?!)
(To meet the real jjamjjamyeon...)
(Somewhere familiar and friendly, a neighborhood in Gochang, Jeollabuk-do...)
Hello everybody
So for today
I came to the market in Gochang, Jeollabuk-do

I heard that there’s a place that’s very famous for jjamjjamyeon
Usually, they are divided like this
(The visual we all know well) The jjamppong and jajangmyeon are served separately
This place’s jjamjjamyeon is served so that I can mix it together
(Not just plain jjamjjamyeon) It's called mixed jjamjjamyeon, I looked it up because it sounded interesting
Ta-da, it’s here!
(Gochang, Jeollabuk-do) 'Narae Palace'
It's a very famous place for mixed jjamjjamyeon
Will it taste good if I mix it?
(I have no idea what it tastes like...!) I don't know, but let’s go inside
(Entering the store) Hello
So...
Like a typical Chinese restaurant, there is a lot on the menu
(Also full of set meals!)
I want one sweet and sour pork too
(Get recommended by the owner when in doubt) Which one is popular here?

Jjamjjamyeon!
(Jjamjjamyeon all started here...!) This place made the first jjamjjamyeon
That’s so amazing! Am I supposed to mix it?
The jajangmyeon with the jjambbong?
(You’ve never tried mixed jjamjjamyeon, right?) Yes, that's right
(An order of jjamjjamyeon, and what’s next?) What else is popular here?
Seafood jjamppong, beef brisket jjamppong
(Recommendation positively reflected)
(Today's order) (Jjajangmyeon, 2 jjamjjamyeon, beef brisket jjamppong, sweet and sour pork)
(Wait, you said you were eating this alone...?)
How can you eat all of that!!!
(I knew she eats well, but not this much...)
- Did you see it? - I see your videos every day
Oh really?
(The owner recognizes Tzuyang) Do you know me?
(Ordinary people can’t finish this, but she’s Tzuyang...!)

(Serving the meals)
You’re eating alone?
(I eat really well alone)
I’m going to have dinner again right after eating this
(Common pre-dinner snack) So today I will keep it simple
(Crispy sweet and sour pork loved by everyone)
(Stir-fry all kinds of seafood over a fire)
(And pull out the chewy noodles...)
(It's spicy jjamppong with a smoky taste)
(Jjamjjamyeon keeps all the indecisiveness away)
(A hearty meal of Chinese cuisine)
(Quick delivery) Wow, thank you
- Mix it thoroughly - Okay
Thank you
The sweet and sour pork looks very tasty too
(You eat it all by yourself...?)

That's impossible...
(Looking for someone to help) You have to help her
I’m eating less than usual today
I'm so curious
I have to mix up the jjamppong and jajangmyeon together
It's their signature dish, so I'll try it first
(I can feel the energy of the restaurant...!) It's delicious
Delicious!
It tastes a bit strong on my palate
But the seasoning itself is so delicious
(Cutting ceremony of jjamjjamyeon) Cut it in half and...
I wonder how it’ll taste
It looks more delicious than I thought!
(Various seafood that stands out) There are octopus, squid, and shrimp inside
That’s a lot of seafood
(I can't stand it...!)

(Touched) It's delicious
Jjamppong was mixed with the smoky spicy jjajang
(Taste beyond imagination) I thought it would be a bit weird, but it's so delicious
(Rediscovery of jjamjjamyeon in Gochang) It's a new taste
Amazing
The seafood inside is very tender
(Two flavors in one bite) I can taste the jjamppong and jajangmyeon at the same time
I feel like this is the real jjamjjamyeon!
(Fizzy drink time) Pour the Cider
(The Tzu-man appeared briefly) Oh, that's amazing
Let’s try some sweet and sour pork
(Sweet and sour pork dressed in white batter)
Is this glutinous rice sweet and sour pork? Looks so delicious
(This tastes like...)
This sweet and sour pork is crazy, it’s really crispy
I think it's glutinous rice sweet and sour pork

(Neither a team pour nor team dip) I'm half and half
Amazing
(Let's finish the rest) Let’s first finish this one
(Get the last drop of sauce)
(Jjamjjamyeon done)
(Immediately goes for the next food)
Let’s try the jajangmyeon!
I'm a jajangmyeon fanatic, you know?
(Let’s mix up the jajangmyeon)
This is like a jumbo size!
(The owner is so generous) I’ve eaten a lot of jajangmyeon before
And this is definitely a jumbo size
My hand hurts when I mix jajangmyeon...!
(Even if it hurts, I still have to eat...)
It tastes like the old jajangmyeon
The black bean flavor is so rich

A taste of umami?!
(Tzuyang eating deliciously)
(The owner is so amazed...)
(I'm doing fine, no worries...)
(Jjajangmyeon disappeared)
But this one is better when dipped!
The fried batter is so crispy and delicious, so it must be dipped!
You must get a dish of jjamjjamyeon and sweet and sour pork
The sweet and sour pork is so delicious
(Who poured half of it?) Who poured this?
(Noticed the next target)
Looks delicious!
It’s full of nutrients
The noodles are slightly green
Looks a bit yellow, a bit green
(What’s this green color?) Barley sprouts

- Oh, do barley sprouts go inside the noodles? - That's one of the things that makes us popular
(The one & only barley sprout noodles) Barley sprout noodles are only used in our restaurant
(Expensive barley sprout is generously added) Apparently, they use the expensive barley sprouts here
(Mysterious barley sprout colored noodles)
The noodles are slightly green
Let’s try the soup
The soup is absolutely delicious!
The soup tastes a bit thick like beef bone broth
Smoked beef bone broth
(Eating and eating)
Oh and apparently...
I forgot to say it before
There’s a line during lunchtime regardless of weekends or weekdays
People receive queue cards and waited outside...!
I guess I'm strangely lucky...!
- At the most bustling time, people wait for an hour - Wait an hour? Wow...

It's been 25 years since I've been serving Chinese food here
So when was jjamjjamyeon made?
(10th year of jjamjjamyeon skill) It's been 10 years
- By the way, I've never seen anyone like this! - How can you eat like that when you're so skinny?!
(This is the first time seeing someone eat like this...)
The portion was huge
(Customized Gochang generosity)
(The generosity of the jjamjamyeon circle) I tend to make big portions...
- Before you go...! - Yes!
(Autograph is required) Please sign me an autograph
(Empty shell goes out)
My last bowl of jjamjjamyeon!
But it's really delicious, so I want to eat it again soon
(Let’s finish this up)
(Mix up the last jjamjjamyeon as well...)
(Nom)

I’ll eat it again haha
As soon as you take a bite, you can taste the fire
(Jjangmyeon right after the jjamppong) I can taste the jjamppong first
And then I can taste a bit of jajangmyeon
(Amazing harmony) It goes well so nicely!
(I can feel the gaze from somewhere...)
(The owner is so amazed...)
(So delicious)
(Endless eating)
(Eating and tidying up carefully)
(Gathers up the remaining jjamjjamyeon)
(Goes straight into the mouth)
(Clean)
This soup is no joke
It must have been hard, you ate too much!
Oh, no haha

(Can’t believe what she just saw) How can you be so skinny?
Where did all the food go?
- You eat really well haha - Thank you!
(You ate all of that...?)
(Amazing...)
Thanks for the meal!
